page: Microsoft Azure D128ls_v7 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the Dlsv7 family. It features 128 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor and is managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance is configured with 256.0 GB of system memory, resulting in a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per vCPU.

This server type does not include local storage, but it is designated as Premium Storage capable, allowing users to attach external high-performance storage volumes. There are zero integrated GPUs, meaning all workloads rely entirely on the 128 dedicated x86_64 CPU cores. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are bundled with this instance.

Due to its 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the D128ls_v7 is structured as a compute-heavy, low-memory resource. This configuration offers qualitative cost efficiency for highly parallelized workloads that require massive CPU capacity but have moderate memory footprints, avoiding the higher costs associated with memory-optimized instances. It is suitable for compute-intensive tasks, batch processing, large-scale web serving, and distributed compilation workloads.
description: Microsoft Azure D128ls_v7 is a compute-focused virtual machine from the Dlsv7 family, featuring 128 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs powered by an Intel processor and managed via Microsoft Hyper-V. The instance is configured with 256.0 GB of RAM, establishing a 2.0 GB per vCPU ratio designed for compute-heavy workloads with lower memory requirements. It does not include local storage but is Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-performance external disk attachments. With zero integrated GPUs, the instance relies entirely on its massive CPU core count for processing power. This resource profile offers a cost-efficient alternative to memory-optimized instances for parallelized tasks that do not require large memory footprints. It is suited for compute-intensive workloads, batch processing, and large-scale web serving.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D128ls_v7 is a compute-focused virtual machine featuring 128 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 256 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability for highly parallelized workloads.

tagline: A high-core compute instance featuring one hundred twenty-eight dedicated virtual processors and a balanced two gigabytes of memory per core.
bullet_points: 128 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs powered by Intel processors
256.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB per core
Premium Storage capable with no local storage included
Optimized for compute-intensive and highly parallelized workloads
